title: Curiosity rover finds clues to Mars' watery past in rocky 'spiderwebs'
description: The web-like features are believed to be sculpted by ancient groundwater, offering new clues about the Red Planet's watery past.
content: The web-like features are believed to be sculpted by ancient groundwater, offering new clues about the Red Planet's watery past.
